self.__next_f.push([1,"{\"id\":\"e547d7af-df06-473a-9f83-96beb1d4cd3b\",\"positionId\":\"topmid-smoke-from-t-spawn\",\"mapId\":\"mirage\",\"type\":\"smoke\",\"team\":\"t\",\"coverImg\":\"https://assets.cs2util.com/mirage/smoke/topmid/topmid-smoke-from-t-spawn-cover.webp\",\"translations\":{\"en\":{\"name\":\"Top Mid Smoke From TSpawn\",\"description\":\"\",\"instruction\":\"Press against the trash bin.\\nLine up with the utility pole.\\nThrow with left click.\"}},\"lineupUrl\":\"https://assets.cs2util.com/mirage/smoke/topmid/topmid-smoke-from-t-spawn-lineup.webp\",\"lineupMiniUrl\":\"https://assets.cs2util.com/mirage/smoke/topmid/topmid-smoke-from-t-spawn-lineup-mini.webp\",\"throwTime\":4.4,\"needJump\":false,\"videoUrl1kWebm\":\"https://assets.cs2util.com/mirage/smoke/topmid/topmid-smoke-from-t-spawn.webm\",\"mouseButton\":\"left\",\"movement\":\"standing\",\"pos\":\"setpos 1422.972412 36.468750 -104.128754;setang -42.405064 -160.391098 0.000000\",\"mapPos\":{\"x\":71,\"y\":97}}"]);
